note: هر کامپوننت دارای ID یکتا، کلاس‌های Tailwind، رنگ‌های دقیق و توضیح رفتار است.

components.name: App Shell (Desktop Layout)
components.description: ساختار اصلی صفحه دسکتاپ: Sidebar + Chat List + Chat Window
components.tailwind_classes: flex h-screen w-full bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-slate-900 overflow-hidden font-sans text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: منوی سمت راست در دسکتاپ (RTL) — عرض ۲۸۰ پیکسل
components.tailwind_classes: w-[280px] h-full bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-l border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 flex flex-col z-20 hidden md:flex

items.name: Sidebar Nav Item
items.tailwind: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-slate-500 hover:bg-blue-50 hover:text-blue-600 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-150

components.name: Chat List Panel
components.description: لیست چت‌ها بین سایدبار و پنجره چت
components.tailwind_classes: w-[360px] h-full bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-l border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 flex flex-col z-10 hidden md:flex

components.name: Chat Window (Active)
components.description: پنجره اصلی چت که پیام‌ها را نمایش می‌دهد
components.tailwind_classes: flex-1 h-full bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-slate-950 flex flex-col relative

components.name: Chat List Header & Search
components.description: عنوان لیست چت و فیلد جستجو
components.tailwind_classes: p-4 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800

search_input.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 border-none rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-400

components.name: Chat List Item
components.description: آیتم تک چت در لیست
components.tailwind_classes: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors border-b border-slate-50 dark:border-slate-800/50

meta.badge: bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs font-bold min-w-[20px] h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center px-1.5

components.name: Chat Header
components.description: هدر بالای پنجره چت با اطلاعات طرف مقابل
components.tailwind_classes: h-16 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between px-4 z-10

components.name: Message List Container
components.description: ناحیه اسکرول‌خور پیام‌ها
components.tailwind_classes: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-3 scroll-smooth

components.name: Message Input Area
components.description: نوار پایین برای تایپ و ارسال پیام
components.tailwind_classes: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 p-3 flex items-end gap-2

textarea.tailwind: flex-1 max-h-32 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-base focus:outline-none resize-none placeholder-slate-400 dark:text-slate-100

buttons.send: text-white bg-blue-600 rounded-full p-1.5 hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer

components.name: Message Bubble
components.description: حباب تکی پیام

variants.tailwind_classes: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm px-4 py-2 max-w-[70%] self-end ml-4 shadow-sm
bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-2 max-w-[70%] self-start mr-4 shadow-sm

meta_row.tailwind: flex items-center justify-end gap-1 mt-1 select-none

components.name: Date Divider
components.description: خط جداکننده تاریخ‌ها (امروز، دیروز)
components.tailwind_classes: flex items-center justify-center my-4
components.badge: bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700 text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-300 text-xs font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full

components.name: Typing Indicator
components.description: انیمیشن سه نقطه وقتی طرف مقابل تایپ می‌کند
components.tailwind_classes: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-3 self-start mr-4 shadow-sm flex items-center gap-1

components.name: Reply Bar
components.description: نوار پاسخ بالای Input Area
components.tailwind_classes: mx-3 mb-2 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border-l-4 border-blue-500 rounded-r-lg p-2 flex items-center gap-2

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: دکمه اصلی فراخوان (ادامه، ورود، ارسال)
components.tailwind_classes: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-bold py-2.5 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed

components.name: OTP Input Field
components.description: خانه‌های ورودی کد تایید
components.tailwind_classes: w-12 h-12 text-center text-xl font-bold bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 outline-none transition-all

components.name: Floating Action Button (FAB)
components.description: دکمه شناور شروع چت جدید در موبایل
components.tailwind_classes: fixed bottom-20 left-4 w-14 h-14 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-full shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/40 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all flex items-center justify-center z-50 md:hidden

components.name: Bottom Navigation (Mobile)
components.description: نوار پایین اپ در موبایل — ۵ آیتم
components.tailwind_classes: h-14 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-around fixed bottom-0 w-full z-40 safe-area-pb

item.tailwind: flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-600 active:text-blue-700 transition-colors

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: سوییچ فعال/غیرفعال
components.tailwind_classes: relative w-11 h-6 bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700 rounded-full cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-200
components.thumb: absolute top-0.5 left-0.5 w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-full shadow transition-transform duration-200

components.name: Profile Avatar with Status
components.description: عکس پروفایل با نشانگر وضعیت آنلاین
components.tailwind_classes: relative w-12 h-12
components.image: w-full h-full rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-white dark:border-slate-900
components.status_dot: absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-3.5 h-3.5 bg-emerald-500 border-2 border-white dark:border-slate-900 rounded-full

components.name: Modal Overlay
components.description: لایه تاریک پشت مودال
components.tailwind_classes: fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4

components.name: Modal Content
components.description: بدنه مودال
components.tailwind_classes: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-md shadow-xl overflow-hidden animate-modal-in
components.header: p-4 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700 flex items-center justify-between

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: اعلان کوتاه مدت بالا صفحه
components.tailwind_classes: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-100 text-white dark:text-slate-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-lg text-sm font-medium z-[60]
